channel.title: Cancer - Bladder on VitaminDWiki
channel.description: Recent content in Cancer - Bladder on VitaminDWiki

item.title: Cancers are sometimes associated with poor CYP24A1 gene (Vitamin D) (Bladder Cancer in this case)
item.description:
• Association Between CYP24A1 Polymorphisms and Bladder Cancer Risk in the Chinese Han Population
      • VitaminDWiki – Cancers might alter CYP24A1 gene

Association Between CYP24A1 Polymorphisms and Bladder Cancer Risk in the Chinese Han Population

Biochemical Genetics https://doi.org/10.1007/s10528-024-10771-z PDF behind paywall and at DeepDyve

Tianyi Zhang, Baoping Hu, Shilin Xu, Yuhe Wang, Hengxun Zhang, Xuemei Li, Xuguang Li, Tianbo Jin & Yongjun He

item.title: 13 Cancers are helped by Vitamin D – Biobank
item.description:
Associations of 25-hydroxyvitamin D status and vitamin D supplementation use with mortality due to 18 frequent cancer types in the UK Biobank cohort

European Journal of Cancer :July 17, 2023 DOI:https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ejca.2023.113241 PDF is behind a paywall

Sha Sha, Li-Ju Chen, PhD, Hermann Brenner, Prof. MD. Ben Schöttker, PhD

Reduced Cancer for people reporting taking any amount of Vitamin D

Highlights

  • Deaths due to 18 specific cancers were the outcomes of interest in the UK Biobank.

item.title: Deaths from many types of Cancer associated with low vitamin D- review of meta-analyses
Bladder Cancer deaths – 2.9X more likely if low Vitamin D, no death if more than 30 ng
Good Vitamin D receptor reduced bladder cancer and cisplatin deaths
Increased incidence of 7 cancers if live far from equator (if not take vitamin D)
item.description:
The Role of Vitamin D and Sunlight Incidence in Cancer.

Anticancer Agents Med Chem. 2019 Mar 12. doi: 10.2174/1389557519666190312123212

Câmara AB1, Brandãob IA2.

  • 1 Department of Biophysics and Pharmacology, Bioscience Center, Federal University of Rio Grande do Norte, 59064-741, Natal/RN. Brazil.

  • 2 Metrópole Digital Institute, Federal University of Rio Grande do Norte, 59078-970, Natal/RN. Brazil.

#### Cancers

  • Getting little UV is associated with 15 types of Cancer – Jan 2012
